caption: A man and a woman are seated in chairs on a dark stage during a discussion. The man, on the left, wears a white long-sleeved button-down shirt and has dark hair and a beard. The woman, on the right, has blonde hair tied back and wears a black t-shirt with the text "WHO'S IN YOUR" visible across the chest. They are both seated in light-colored wooden chairs, with a white rectangular piece of equipment sitting on a table in front of them. In the background, a purple neon light strip is visible against the dark backdrop. Throughout the sequence, the man remains relatively still, looking toward the woman. The woman is actively speaking; she begins with her hands clasped in her lap and gradually opens her arms and gestures with her hands to emphasize her points as the scene progresses.
